item.title: How to Authorize AI Agents Using Token Exchange Open Standards
item.snippet: This article focuses on token exchange, delegated access, authorization boundaries, and policy controls for AI agents.
item.content:
The article explains why AI agents need delegated authorization and how token exchange supports secure tool access.

## Token Exchange
Token exchange and OAuth flows are the central mechanism.

## Authorization Boundaries
Permissions, identity, and access control shape the security model.

## Policy Enforcement
Governance and scoped access rules keep agent actions constrained.

Cloud deployment is mentioned briefly as an implementation detail.
